---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve? How does it fit with HoverSense's educational mission?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior you'd like. If you have a technical approach in mind, describe it here.

## Which Module(s) Would This Touch?

- [ ] `hover-tracker.js` — capture layer
- [ ] `rule-engine.js` — heuristic scoring
- [ ] `ml-model.js` — ML inference
- [ ] `profile-builder.js` — session state
- [ ] `dashboard.js` — rendering
- [ ] `heatmap.js` — canvas overlay
- [ ] `helpers.js` — utilities
- [ ] `index.html` / cards / content
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Documentation only

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider and why did you rule them out?

## Does This Add a Dependency?

HoverSense is intentionally zero-dependency for the application itself. If your feature requires a library, please justify why a pure implementation is not feasible.

- [ ] No new dependencies
- [ ] Requires new dependency: _____ (justify below)
